title: KyberSwap - REKT
relevance_summary: Flash loan followed by precise swaps on concentrated liquidity pools

prevention.rule: Block any tx that borrows a flash loan and then executes swaps in the same transaction

summary: The attacker exploited KyberSwap Elastic pools by borrowing flash loans and executing precise swaps to manipulate prices and drain liquidity, resulting in a loss of over $48M across multiple chains. A guard could have blocked such transactions by detecting a flash loan followed by swaps in the same transaction.
